title: euphorbia bivonae
intro: Euphorbia bivonae, also known as the dwarf poinsettia, is a succulent plant species native to the Canary Islands. Euphorbia bivonae has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Euphorbia bivonae is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
